title: Manicurists and Pedicurists
description: Clean and shape customers' fingernails and toenails. May polish or decorate nails.

tasks.text: Clean and sanitize tools and work environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply undercoat and clear or colored polish onto nails with brush.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain supply inventories and records of client services.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Shape and smooth ends of nails, using scissors, files, or emery boards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare nail cuticles with water and oil, using cuticle knives to push back cuticles and scissors or nippers to trim cuticles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare customers' nails in soapy water, using swabs, files, and orange sticks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove previously applied nail polish, using liquid remover and swabs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use rotary abrasive wheels to shape and smooth nails or artificial extensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule client appointments and accept payments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess the condition of clients' hands, remove dead skin, and massage hands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Roughen surfaces of fingernails, using abrasive wheel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise clients on nail care and use of products and colors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Treat nails to repair or improve strength and resilience by wrapping.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Extend nails using powder, solvent, and paper forms attached to tips of customers' fingers to support and shape artificial nails.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Polish nails, using powdered polish and buffer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Whiten underside of nails with white paste or pencils.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Promote and sell nail care products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Decorate clients' nails by piercing or attaching ornaments or designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
